reviews.review_description: This game has potential. But its so very unsatisfying to play. Mining has 0 haptics. Making mining feel like a chore rather than an fun experience. The monsters that are in the game are just there to be put in a relegated area and shut away. The progression feel very bad and when i tried to purchase the first pickaxe upgrade it broke. It has serious potential but needs serious improvement.
Nice community no racism nice staff and good team I hopp on for like three hours every day  my favorite game  🤩 ￼
The game is very good and fun but i dont know how to get to the unexplored places
It just came out but it is amazing, it’s very original and fun. Its buggy right now but I hope it will be fixed soon.
W graphics w cosmetic w lighting w everything looks even for being a new game its good.
